title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull, run and manage GGUF models locally with a built-in OpenAI-compatible server.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript client for the Ollama HTTP API—works in Node and browsers.

title: ollama/ollama-python
summary: Official Python client with sync & async APIs for chatting, embedding and pulling models.

title: jmorganca/ollama
summary: Community fork adding Docker images, Helm charts and extra model conversion scripts.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (like ChatGPT) that connects to any Ollama instance via OpenAI API.

title: langchain-ai/langchain-community
summary: LangChain integration letting you use Ollama models as LLM or Chat components with one line.

title: ollama4j/ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive wrappers.

title: richawo/ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based TUI that lets you fuzzy-search, chat and manage Ollama models from the terminal.

title: sugarforever/ollama-chainlit
summary: Chainlit UI that wires Ollama models into conversational apps with memory and tools.

title: ollama-r/ollamar
summary: R package providing a high-level interface to Ollama for local LLM inference and embeddings.

title: kevinwatt/ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that streams Ollama model replies into any channel using slash commands.

title: ollama/ollama-hub
summary: Curated registry of community Modelfiles, tools and example apps for Ollama.

title: mchiang0612/ollama-github-action
summary: GitHub Action that spins up Ollama inside CI so you can run LLM-based tests or evaluations.

title: ollama-cpp/ollama-cpp
summary: Header-only C++17 client library for Ollama with CMake fetch-content support.

title: ollama-npm/ollama
summary: Official NPM package providing a typed JS client for Ollama’s REST endpoints.

title: ollama-pypi/ollama
summary: Official PyPI package exposing sync & async Pythonic APIs to Ollama.
